questions.question: Name the famous duo who made nine films together, including Adam's Rib and Guess Who's Coming to Dinner.
Name the author whose novel, On the Road, became the representation of the Beat movement?
How far did The Four Preps have to go 'across the sea' to an 'island of romance'?
What 1965 invention by DuPont chemists was a plastic that was five times stronger than steel?
What did it mean when someone said you are 'cruisin' for a bruisin''?
questions.answer: You are deserving of a set-down, verbally or physically; looking for trouble
